full_text:
Zhu Cai (Yunye) 朱才 (君業)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Cai (朱才), styledYunye (君業), was born in Wu Commandery. Zhu Zhi’s oldest biological son. He earned merit when accompanying his father in battle, and showed both respect and virtue outside it. Zhu Cai was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
